hero.title: Agentic AI Developer | Full Stack AI Engineer
hero.bio: AI developer focused on building autonomous AI systems, intelligent agents, and automation workflows. I enjoy working with Large Language Models, RAG, modern AI frameworks, and full-stack technologies to create scalable, real-world applications. I continuously learn, experiment, and build projects that push my understanding of artificial intelligence.

about.description:
Hi, I'm Vaibhav, a B.Tech Computer Science (AI & ML) student with a strong interest in Agentic AI, AI agents, LLM applications, and workflow automation.

I enjoy building intelligent systems that automate repetitive tasks, assist users in making better decisions, and solve practical real-world problems. My work combines AI with modern full-stack development to create scalable and user-friendly applications.

I'm a curious and quick learner who enjoys exploring new AI frameworks, experimenting with emerging technologies, and continuously improving my skills through hands-on projects. I believe the best way to learn is by building, so I'm always working on projects that challenge me and expand my understanding of artificial intelligence.

I'm currently focused on Agentic AI, RAG systems, multi-agent architectures, AI automation, and production-ready AI applications, while actively seeking opportunities to contribute to innovative AI products and collaborate with like-minded developers.

projects.title: Herbalia
projects.description: An AI-powered botanical assistant and plant doctor. Features a universal plant identifier, an automated disease & health scanner, and a generative AI chat assistant.

projects.title: AI Product Recommendation System
projects.description: An intelligent recommendation engine utilizing AI and ML algorithms to suggest relevant products to users based on preferences and behavior.

projects.title: Responsive E-commerce Website
projects.description: A fully responsive e-commerce platform featuring product listings, search functionality, and a shopping cart with dynamic state management.

projects.title: Price Tracking App
projects.description: An application to monitor product prices and display trends over time, featuring automated price updates and responsive dashboards.

achievements.title: Google Cloud Architect
achievements.description: Designed and deployed a highly available, serverless microservices architecture that scaled to 100k users.

achievements.title: React Native Specialist
achievements.description: Completed an intensive 12-week bootcamp focused on cross-platform mobile development, ultimately publishing a featured app to the App Store.
